title: ilex kingiana
intro: Ilex kingiana, also known as the New Zealand holly or matipo, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. Traditionally used in Maori medicine, Ilex kingiana has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ilex kingiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Ilex kingiana are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
